execution_prompt.mandatory_first_action: Before writing ANY file, produce a structured summary with these sections: 1. PREDECESSOR STATE ==== Task 4.9d final metrics + 10 locked decisions 2. OBJECTIVE ==== What 4.10 must achieve (zero EVALUATING rows, workload profiles, closure) 3. DELIVERABLES ==== 7 items (D-1 through D-7) with target files 4. MICRO-DECISIONS ==== Q-1 LOCK_ADVISORY, Q-2 DEFER_TO_TASK5, Q-3 YES 5. ADR-012 §2.2 CHANGES ==== Exact row-level before/after for the 2 EVALUATING rows 6. CONSTRAINTS ==== All 6 7. VERIFICATION ==== 4 terminal commands Wait for Lead Architect approval before proceeding to implementation.
execution_prompt.objective:
Close out the Task 4 Production Configuration Feasibility Study by: (1) resolving all remaining EVALUATING parameters in ADR-012 §2.2 to zero EVALUATING rows, (2) compiling final per-component production workload profile tables, (3) generating a structured decision registry evidence artifact, and (4) recording the Task 4 closure milestone in all governance documents.
This is a DOCS-ONLY milestone. No production code, test files, or existing evidence artifacts are modified. The only new file created is the evidence JSON (D-3).
After Task 4.10, the roadmap proceeds to Task 4.11 (Security Hardening) then Task 5 (Model Upgrade to Qwen3-14B).

decision.rationale: Preserve the ~12,288 input / ~4,096 output heuristic as an advisory guideline with explicit "not empirically optimized" caveat. No component enforces this split, but it is a useful reference for future USE-CASE-005 integration.
decision.adr_action: Change status from **EVALUATING** to **ADVISORY**. Update Notes column to: "Heuristic guideline (75/25 split of 16,384 max context). Not empirically optimized. PA: irrelevant (output 3-10 tokens). AO/CODE: revisit if output truncation observed in production."

decision.rationale: Production currently runs Qwen3-1.7B. No AO/CODE empirical data on Qwen3-14B exists. Task 5 upgrades both to 14B and is the correct point to tune max_new_tokens for these components. Avoids locking a value predicted to change.
decision.adr_action: Within the GenConfig row: mark AO/CODE max_new_tokens as DEFERRED_TO_TASK5. Change composite row status from **EVALUATING** to **LOCKED** (individual sub-params are all either LOCKED, specified in §2.4, or DEFERRED_TO_TASK5).

decision.action: Update §0 status table: Task 4.10 row to COMPLETE upon milestone execution.

deliverable.action: Resolve both EVALUATING rows to zero EVALUATING remaining.
deliverable.detail:
ROW 1 ==== Input/output split: BEFORE: | Input/output split | ~12,288 input / ~4,096 output | **EVALUATING** | 70–80% input / 20–30% output guideline for USE-CASE-005 coding tasks. | AFTER: | Input/output split | ~12,288 input / ~4,096 output | **ADVISORY** | Heuristic guideline (75/25 split of 16,384 max context). Not empirically optimized. PA: irrelevant (output 3-10 tokens). AO/CODE: revisit if output truncation observed in production. |
ROW 2 ==== GenConfig fields: BEFORE: Status column shows **EVALUATING** AFTER: Status column shows **LOCKED** The Notes column must be updated to clarify sub-parameter resolution: - PA max_new_tokens=10 LOCKED (DEC-08, Task 4.8) - PA stop_token_ids=[151645, 151668] LOCKED (§2.4) - AO stop_token_ids=[151645] LOCKED (§2.4) - AO/CODE max_new_tokens DEFERRED_TO_TASK5 (Q-2: no 14B empirical data; Task 5 is the correct tuning point) - num_assistant_tokens=3 LOCKED (DEC-01, Task 4.3) - do_sample=False LOCKED (project mandate)
Also append to the GenConfig notes: Task 4.9d reference ==== "PA quality gate PASS (agreement 1.000, 40/40, adversarial 1.000, 8/8). DeterministicPolicyChecker: 6 rules (4 DENY + 2 ESCALATE), 25/40 prefiltered. Commit 40443b0. Evidence: p5_task4_9d_escalate_hardening.json."
Also update the §2.2 section heading: BEFORE: ### 2.2 Configuration Optimization ==== In Progress AFTER: ### 2.2 Configuration Optimization ==== Complete
VERIFICATION: After D-1, grep for **EVALUATING** in §2.2 must return zero matches. VERIFICATION: The §2.2 section heading must NOT contain "In Progress".

deliverable.action: Add new §2.6 ==== Production Workload Profiles (Task 4 Exit State)
deliverable.detail:
Insert after current §2.5 (PA Latency Budget). Add a header note: "These profiles represent the Task 4 exit state. Parameters locked during Tasks 4.1-4.9d. Values marked DEFERRED_TO_TASK5 will be resolved during Task 5 model upgrade."
TABLE 1 ==== USE-CASE-001 Policy Agent (PA): | Parameter | Value | Source | |-----------|-------|--------| | Model | Qwen3-14B INT4 | ADR-012 §2.1 | | Device | GPU (Arc 140V) | ADR-011 | | Draft model | Qwen3-0.6B INT4 28L | DEC-01 (Task 4.2) | | num_assistant_tokens | 3 | DEC-01 (Task 4.3) | | max_new_tokens | 10 | DEC-08 (Task 4.8) | | stop_token_ids | [151645, 151668] | §2.4 | | Thinking mode | /no_think MANDATORY | DEC-09b (Task 4.9b) | | INFERENCE_PRECISION_HINT | f16 | DEC-07 (Task 4.7) | | GPU_ENABLE_SDPA_OPTIMIZATION | ON | DEC-05 (Task 4.4) | | enable_prefix_caching | OFF | DEC-06 (Task 4.6) | | use_sparse_attention | OFF | DEFERRED (Task 4.3b) | | do_sample | False | Project mandate | | temperature | 0.0 | Project mandate | | DeterministicPolicyChecker | 6 rules (4 DENY + 2 ESCALATE), 25/40 prefiltered | DEC-10 (Tasks 4.9c-4.9d) | | Quality gate | agreement 1.000 (40/40), adversarial 1.000 (8/8) | DEC-10 | | Latency budget | 2,000ms P95 | ADR-012 §2.5 (Task 4.1) |
TABLE 2 ==== USE-CASE-004 Assistant Orchestrator (AO): | Parameter | Value | Source | |-----------|-------|--------| | Model | Qwen3-14B INT4 | ADR-012 §2.1 | | Device | GPU (Arc 140V) | ADR-011 | | Draft model | Qwen3-0.6B INT4 28L | DEC-01 (Task 4.2) | | num_assistant_tokens | 3 | DEC-01 (Task 4.3) | | max_new_tokens | DEFERRED_TO_TASK5 | Q-2 (no 14B data) | | stop_token_ids | [151645] | §2.4 | | Thinking mode | Default (thinking allowed) | §2.4 | | INFERENCE_PRECISION_HINT | f16 | DEC-07 (Task 4.7) | | GPU_ENABLE_SDPA_OPTIMIZATION | ON | DEC-05 (Task 4.4) | | enable_prefix_caching | OFF | DEC-06 (Task 4.6) | | use_sparse_attention | OFF | DEFERRED (Task 4.3b) | | do_sample | False | Project mandate | | temperature | 0.0 | Project mandate |
TABLE 3 ==== USE-CASE-005 Code Agent (not yet in production): Same as AO profile except: | Thinking mode | Context-dependent (/think complex, /no_think simple) | §2.4 | | max_new_tokens | DEFERRED_TO_TASK5 | Q-2 (no 14B data) | Add note: "CODE profile inherits AO shared parameters. Component-specific tuning deferred to Task 5 when Qwen3-14B is deployed for code generation."
POST-TASK-4 SECURITY CAVEATS (mandatory subsection after the 3 tables): Include a note titled "Security Caveats — Pending Task 4.11" with these items:
1. **mTLS CN → source_agent validation (P0):** The PA DeterministicPolicyChecker ESCALATE_CROSS_AGENT_OWNERSHIP rule depends on source_agent integrity. Currently source_agent is self-asserted — no code extracts the peer cert CN to validate it. A compromised agent holding a valid mTLS cert can spoof source_agent and bypass ownership-based ESCALATE rules. Fix scoped to Task 4.11. (AI Risk Assessment §Recommendation 3; SECURITY_ASSESSMENT.md P0-1)
2. **parameters_schema prompt injection (P0):** car.parameters_schema is serialized via json.dumps() and concatenated directly into the LLM prompt with no schema validation or sanitization. The DeterministicPolicyChecker's string-match rules catch narrow patterns but do not defend against general prompt injection payloads embedded in parameters_schema. Fix scoped to Task 4.11. (AI Risk Assessment §Recommendation 1; SECURITY_ASSESSMENT.md P0-2)
3. **Authority claim regex bypass (HIGH):** Unicode homoglyphs and synonym substitution bypass the 5-pattern _AUTHORITY_CLAIM_RE. Fix scoped to Task 4.11. (SECURITY_ASSESSMENT.md P1-1)
Add closing note: "These caveats do not invalidate the Task 4 configuration decisions. They document known security gaps that Task 4.11 (Security Hardening) must resolve before Task 5 (Model Upgrade). Task 5 is blocked on Task 4.11 completion."

deliverable.action: Create Task 4 decision registry evidence artifact (new file).
deliverable.detail:
Structured JSON with these top-level keys:
"task": "P5-Task-4.10", "title": "Workload Profile Lock + ADR-012 §2.2 Finalization", "date": "2026-03-05", "type": "DOCS_ONLY", "predecessor": { "task": "4.9d", "commit": "40443b0", "agreement": 1.000 },
"decisions": [ { "id": "DEC-01", "parameter": "num_assistant_tokens", "value": 3, "status": "LOCKED", "task_source": "Task 4.3", "evidence": "p5_task4_3_nat_sweep_matrix.json", "lock_date": "2026-03-03", "rationale": "Wins weighted TPS across 512-8K production range (score 4.847)" }, ... (all 10 decisions DEC-01 through DEC-10, each with same structure) ],
"evaluating_resolved": [ { "parameter": "input_output_split", "before_status": "EVALUATING", "after_status": "ADVISORY", "disposition": "LOCK_ADVISORY", "rationale": "Heuristic guideline, not empirically optimized" }, { "parameter": "genconfig_fields", "before_status": "EVALUATING", "after_status": "LOCKED", "sub_parameters": { "pa_max_new_tokens": { "value": 10, "status": "LOCKED", "source": "DEC-08" }, "pa_stop_token_ids": { "value": [151645, 151668], "status": "LOCKED", "source": "§2.4" }, "ao_stop_token_ids": { "value": [151645], "status": "LOCKED", "source": "§2.4" }, "ao_code_max_new_tokens": { "status": "DEFERRED_TO_TASK5", "rationale": "No 14B data" }, "num_assistant_tokens": { "value": 3, "status": "LOCKED", "source": "DEC-01" }, "do_sample": { "value": false, "status": "LOCKED", "source": "project_mandate" } } } ],
"workload_profiles": { "pa": { ... all PA parameters from D-2 table ... }, "ao": { ... all AO parameters from D-2 table ... }, "code": { ... all CODE parameters from D-2 table ... } },
"task4_closure": { "total_sub_sessions": 11, "retired_sub_sessions": 1, "total_decisions": 10, "total_evidence_artifacts": 17, "total_ledger_entries": 15, "ledger_range": "13-27", "date_started": "2026-03-01", "date_closed": "2026-03-05", "evaluating_rows_remaining": 0, "next_task": "4.11 (Security Hardening)" },
"security_caveats": { "source": "docs/SECURITY_ASSESSMENT.md + AI Risk Assessment and Mitigation Strategy.md", "status": "PENDING_TASK_4_11", "findings": [ { "id": "P0-1", "title": "mTLS CN to source_agent validation", "severity": "CRITICAL", "impact": "ESCALATE_CROSS_AGENT_OWNERSHIP rule defeated if source_agent spoofed", "risk_assessment_ref": "Recommendation 3 (Fortify Vsock IPC with mTLS)", "remediation": "Task 4.11" }, { "id": "P0-2", "title": "parameters_schema prompt injection", "severity": "CRITICAL", "impact": "Attacker-crafted CAR can embed prompt injection in parameters_schema", "risk_assessment_ref": "Recommendation 1 (Deterministic Execution Controls)", "remediation": "Task 4.11" }, { "id": "P1-1", "title": "Authority claim regex bypass via Unicode homoglyphs", "severity": "HIGH", "impact": "DENY_AUTHORITY_CLAIM rule bypassed by homoglyph substitution", "risk_assessment_ref": "Recommendation 1 (Deterministic Execution Controls)", "remediation": "Task 4.11" } ], "blocking_note": "Task 5 (Model Upgrade) blocked on Task 4.11 completion" }
The "decisions" array must include ALL 10 decisions with complete metadata. Here is the full registry for EA reference:
DEC-01: NAT=3, Task 4.3, p5_task4_3_nat_sweep_matrix.json, 2026-03-03, rationale: "Wins weighted TPS across 512–8K production range (score 4.847)" DEC-02: spec_decode_collapse_accepted, Task 4.3, p5_task4_3_nat_sweep_matrix.json, 2026-03-03, rationale: "AR=0.000 at ≥16K accepted; system degrades gracefully to autoregressive; no code change" DEC-03: max_context=16384, Task 4.3, p5_task4_3_nat_sweep_matrix.json, 2026-03-03, rationale: "Proven safe at RSS 3,562 MB; speculative decoding inert above ~12K but system functional" DEC-04: task_4.5_retired, Task 4.3, N/A (scope decision), 2026-03-03, rationale: "Fully subsumed by Task 4.3 7-band × 6-NAT matrix" DEC-05: SDPA=ON, Task 4.4, p5_task4_4_xattention_sweep.json, 2026-03-04, rationale: "ON wins or ties at every band (4K–16K); dominant TTFT improvement (+5–26%)" DEC-06: prefix_caching=OFF, Task 4.6, p5_task4_6_prefix_cache_study.json, 2026-03-04, rationale: "Prefix caching destroys speculative decoding AR on warm calls at ≥12K context" DEC-07: FP16_locked, Task 4.7, p5_task4_7_precision_study.json, 2026-03-04, rationale: "BF16 not supported on Arc 140V; FP16 is optimal supported precision" DEC-08: PA_max_new_tokens=10, Task 4.8, p5_task4_8_pa_max_tokens_study.json, 2026-03-04, rationale: "Lowest ceiling with 100% label extraction; think block overhead = 3 tokens, effective label budget = 7" DEC-09b: /no_think_mandatory, Task 4.9b, p5_task4_9b_no_think_measurement.json, 2026-03-05, rationale: "Removing /no_think causes unbounded CoT, 0.025 agreement, 111/120 multi-label rejection" DEC-10: deterministic_prefilter_validated, Task 4.9c-4.9d, p5_task4_9d_escalate_hardening.json, 2026-03-05, rationale: "PA quality gate PASS: 1.000 agreement (40/40), adversarial 1.000, 25/40 prefiltered by 6-rule DeterministicPolicyChecker"

deliverable.action: New Entry 28 ==== Task 4.10: Workload Profile Lock + ADR-012 §2.2 Finalization
deliverable.detail:
Format: same structure as existing entries (27 is the predecessor).
| Field | Value | |---|---| | **Date** | 2026-03-05 | | **Branch** | feature/p5-task4-9-pa-quality-gate | | **Predecessor** | Task 4.9d (commit 40443b0) | | **Commit** | (fill after commit) | | **Disposition** | DOCS-ONLY |
### Context Task 4 Production Configuration Feasibility Study closure. All 10 sub-sessions complete (4.1-4.9d, 4.5 retired). 10 decisions locked (DEC-01 through DEC-10). 2 remaining EVALUATING rows in ADR-012 §2.2 resolved: input/output split to ADVISORY (Q-1), GenConfig composite to LOCKED with AO/CODE max_new_tokens DEFERRED_TO_TASK5 (Q-2).
### Changes - D-1: ADR-012 §2.2 updated ==== zero EVALUATING rows - D-2: ADR-012 §2.6 added ==== 3 workload profile tables (PA, AO, CODE) - D-3: Evidence artifact created ==== decision registry JSON - D-5: IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN §1.23 added - D-6: P5_TASK4_PRODUCTION_CONFIG_FEASIBILITY.md §0 table updated - D-7: ADR-012 header status changed to "Configuration Locked (Task 4 Complete)"
### Artifacts - docs/adrs/ADR-012-Qwen3-14B-Model-Selection-Speculative-Decoding.md (D-1, D-2, D-7) - phase2_gates/evidence/p5_task4_10_profile_lock_summary.json (D-3) - docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md (D-4, this entry) - docs/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md (D-5) - docs/P5_TASK4_PRODUCTION_CONFIG_FEASIBILITY.md (D-6)

deliverable.action: Add §1.23 ==== Phase 5 Task 4.10 Workload Profile Lock
deliverable.detail:
Insert AFTER §1.22 (Task 4.11 placeholder ==== note this is a PENDING placeholder that was added in an earlier session, so §1.23 goes after §1.22 even though Task 4.10 executes before Task 4.11 chronologically).
Content: ### 1.23 Phase 5 ==== Task 4.10: Workload Profile Lock + ADR-012 §2.2 Finalization
DOCS-ONLY milestone. Task 4 Production Configuration Feasibility Study closure. All remaining EVALUATING parameters in ADR-012 §2.2 resolved: input/output split to ADVISORY (per Q-1), GenConfig composite to LOCKED with AO/CODE max_new_tokens DEFERRED_TO_TASK5 (per Q-2). Zero EVALUATING rows remain.
Three production workload profiles compiled (PA, AO, CODE) in ADR-012 §2.6. Decision registry evidence artifact generated with all 10 locked decisions (DEC-01 through DEC-10).
- **Type:** DOCS-ONLY - **Branch:** feature/p5-task4-9-pa-quality-gate - **Commit:** (fill after commit) - **Date:** 2026-03-05 - **LEDGER Entry:** 28 - **Disposition:** COMPLETE - **Deliverables:** - D-1: ADR-012 §2.2 zero EVALUATING rows - D-2: ADR-012 §2.6 production workload profiles - D-3: phase2_gates/evidence/p5_task4_10_profile_lock_summary.json - D-4: LEDGER Entry 28 - D-5: This section (IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN §1.23) - D-6: P5_TASK4_PRODUCTION_CONFIG_FEASIBILITY.md §0 update - D-7: ADR-012 header status change - **Evidence:** phase2_gates/evidence/p5_task4_10_profile_lock_summary.json

deliverable.action: Update Task 4.10 row in §0 table to COMPLETE. Update document header.
deliverable.detail:
In the §0 Task 4 Execution Status table:
BEFORE: | 4.10 | Workload Profile Lock + ADR-012 §2.2 Finalization | PENDING | ==== | ==== | ==== |
AFTER: | 4.10 | Workload Profile Lock + ADR-012 §2.2 Finalization | **COMPLETE** | (commit) | Entry 28 | p5_task4_10_profile_lock_summary.json |
Update document header: BEFORE: **Status:** ACTIVE ==== Tasks 4.1-4.9 COMPLETE (4.5 RETIRED). Task 4.10 NEXT. AFTER: **Status:** ACTIVE ==== Tasks 4.1-4.10 COMPLETE (4.5 RETIRED). Task 4.11 (Security Hardening) NEXT. Update **Updated:** date to 2026-03-05. Update HEAD commit.
BEFORE: **Status:** ACCEPTED ==== Configuration Optimization In Progress AFTER: **Status:** ACCEPTED ==== Configuration Locked (Task 4 Complete)

constraints.constraint: ZERO production code changes. No .py files modified. No test files modified. No existing .json evidence files modified.
After D-1 completes, ADR-012 §2.2 must contain ZERO rows with status **EVALUATING**.
All 10 locked decisions (DEC-01 through DEC-10) must appear in D-3 with evidence citations, task sources, and lock dates.
Workload profile tables in D-2 must cover all three components: PA, AO, CODE.
DEFERRED_TO_TASK5 entries must include explicit justification (no 14B empirical data exists for AO/CODE).
After D-1 completes, the §2.2 section heading must NOT contain "In Progress".

step.action: Structured summary (mandatory_first_action). STOP and wait for approval.
D-7: Update ADR-012 header status line.
D-1: Resolve ADR-012 §2.2 EVALUATING rows (input/output split + GenConfig) + update §2.2 section heading to Complete.
Verify: §2.2 heading no longer contains 'In Progress' (K-6).
D-2: Add ADR-012 §2.6 Production Workload Profiles (3 tables).
Verify: grep ADR-012 for EVALUATING ==== expect zero matches.

commit_template.message:
Task 4.10: Workload Profile Lock + ADR-012 §2.2 Finalization [DOCS-ONLY]
- ADR-012 §2.2: zero EVALUATING rows (input/output split ADVISORY, GenConfig LOCKED) - ADR-012 §2.6: production workload profiles (PA, AO, CODE) - ADR-012 header: "Configuration Locked (Task 4 Complete)" - Evidence: p5_task4_10_profile_lock_summary.json (decision registry) - LEDGER Entry 28, IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN §1.23 - Task 4 closed: 11 sub-sessions, 10 decisions, 17 evidence artifacts

command.purpose: Confirm zero EVALUATING rows in ADR-012

attachment.reason: SDO scope outline with Q-1/Q-2/Q-3 analysis and workload profile table templates
Target document for D-1, D-2, D-7. Current §2.2 EVALUATING rows to resolve.
Project governance, phase directives, coding standards.
P0/P1 findings for D-2 security caveats and D-3 security_caveats JSON section.
This execution prompt (self-reference for EA context).
